title: bradleybond512/crystal-ball
summary: Tauri 2 desktop intelligence platform — Cesium.js 3D globe, 185 live panels, MCP server for Claude Code, and an explainable algorithm intelligence layer (truth scoring, evidence graph, compound risk, forecast calibration) plus shortage / weather / insights engines. 600+ deterministic tests.

title: dryvist/nix-ai
summary: Your AI coding toolkit, declared in Nix — Claude, Gemini, Copilot, 15+ MCP servers, one flake

title: Shahwar0997/detect-plan-grasp
summary: Language-driven robotic manipulation — one natural-language command → detect → grasp → navigate → place. INT8 YOLO + local LLM + from-scratch 6-DOF IK, in MuJoCo.

title: gedankenlust/Kessel
summary: A local knowledge pot with RAG. Throw in text, files, or web pages, and Kessel remembers everything to let you chat with it. Runs entirely on your machine via Ollama.

title: KazKozDev/llmflow-search
summary: Local Deep Research: a multi-agent system built on Anthropic's orchestrator-workers research principles — every claim traced back to a citation-validated SQLite evidence store.

title: TheAmericanMaker/FreeAgent
summary: A Linux-native, modular agent kernel for tool-using LLMs. Apache-2.0.

title: zmustafa/MultiChat
summary: Broadcast one prompt to 2-6 AI models and stream their answers side-by-side, with a Judge synthesizer, tool calling, evals, and an insights dashboard. Local-first, bring your own keys.

title: NavisualGuide/navisual
summary: AI desktop guide that shows you where to click — it observes, never clicks. Free tier (no sign-up), BYOK or local Ollama, source-available.

title: denn-gubsky/loomcycle
summary: The runtime substrate for agentic systems — one Go binary, six LLM providers, MCP-native, configurable as a managed sandbox or full agentic dev environment. Where agents live, talk, and learn.

title: Miosa-osa/OSA
summary: An AI agent that lives on your computer and does the work you ask for, in plain words — from writing code to running your business busywork. Local, one command, any model.

title: Chicktickhack/RAG
summary: A modular Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) backend engine designed to ground AI responses with precise context retrieval. Developed as part of a cross-border full-stack collaboration to build scalable and reliable AI systems

title: backupliton98-star/ai-commander-core
summary: Kodiqa-agent 2026 - Open Source AI Coding Agent with 7 Providers & 69 Commands

title: browseros-ai/BrowserOS
summary: 🌐 The open-source Agentic browser; alternative to ChatGPT Atlas, Perplexity Comet, Dia.

title: Bike4Mind/bike4mind
summary: The open-core AI workbench — notebooks, agents, RAG, voice, and images across any model: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, xAI, or local via Ollama/vLLM. BSL 1.1,  auto-converting to Apache-2.0 on a two-year clock. Your AI keeps running when theirs doesn't.

title: LnYo-Cly/ai4j
summary: 一款JavaSDK用于快速接入AI大模型应用，整合多平台大模型，如OpenAi、智谱Zhipu(ChatGLM)、深度求索DeepSeek、月之暗面Moonshot(Kimi)、腾讯混元Hunyuan、零一万物(01)等等，提供统一的输入输出(对齐OpenAi)消除差异化，优化函数调用(Tool Call)，优化RAG调用、支持向量数据库(Pinecone)、内置联网增强，并且支持JDK1.8，为用户提供快速整合AI的能力。

title: dyad-sh/dyad
summary: Local, open-source AI app builder for power users ✨ v0 / Lovable / Replit / Bolt alternative 🌟 Star if you like it!

title: PTharanan/Yarl-s-AI
summary: A premium full-stack website builder and code generator. Convert text prompts or wireframe sketches into fully interactive responsive websites with live previews. Powered by a hybrid LLM engine (Google Gemini & local Ollama). Built with Angular, TailwindCSS, Django, and Docker.

title: chriswu727/loop-agent
summary: Autonomous software delivery from product brief to verified implementation. Loop plans, builds, tests, and repairs in a task workspace, then hands back reviewable artifacts or Git changes with a replayable Receipt.

title: rmednitzer/ai-stack
summary: Self-hosted AI inference and tooling stack (Open WebUI, Ollama, Qdrant, agents) as a single Helm chart for EU-regulated platforms

title: seshakiran/local-speech-to-speech
summary: Private, fully local realtime voice assistant with Gemma 4, Parakeet STT, Silero VAD, and Qwen3-TTS
